The penultimate day at Stade de France kicked off this morning with the women's heptathlon. American Anna Hall attempted to hold on to third place in the standings but dropped to fifth after competing in the long jump and javelin.

16-year-old. Quincy Wilson made a shaky Olympic debut, anchoring the men's 4x400m relay team, but the team managed to advance to tomorrow's final. The women's 4x400m relay team also qualified in dominant fashion, while Bryce Hoppel (men's 800m) and a trio of American women 100m hurdlers also advanced to finals. Check out the full results below.

The Olympics begin on July 26 and end on August 11. The track and field events began on Aug. 1.

Don’t miss all the track and field season action streaming on FloTrack.Check out the FloTrack schedule for more events.

Video footage from each event will be archived and stored in a video library for FloTrack subscribers to watch for the duration of their subscriptions.
